    • Import Data
    • Data types
    • Vector Algebra
    • Oriented Drill Cores
    • Plotting
    • Orientation Plots
    • Orientation Plots with ggplot
    • Statistics
    • Statistics on the Sphere

    • Faults and Stress
    • Faults and Paleostress
    • Mohr Circle
    • Other
    • Strain and Vorticity Analysis
    • Deformation and Velocity Gradient Tensor

Sorting StraboSpot Projects

Source: R/import.R
sort_by.strabo.Rd

Sorts strabo objects in the order determined by one or more other objects, typically columns in the data data.frame. This will also sort the planar and linear objects.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'strabo'
sort_by(x, y, ...)

Arguments

x

object of class "strabo"

y

Variables to sort by. Typically a column in x$data data.frame. To sort by more than one column, take the form list(g1, g2, ...).

...

Additional arguments, typically passed on to order().

Value

A sorted version of x.

Examples

sort_by(strabo_prj, strabo_prj$data$dip_direction)
#> $data
#>                                        id dip_direction   dip strike plunge
#>                                    <char>         <num> <num>  <num>  <num>
#>   1: 8eafa098-d0f9-4f5a-bea1-32ecacfdf67e             0    42    270      6
#>   2: 201a5d08-a890-454d-8132-f795dc9e78c5             0    61    270     50
#>   3: 5db25631-768a-4dbc-991c-ecf14e24d938             2    41    272     11
#>   4: 79276f3e-87eb-4aae-807a-d188c5fd5b98             2    39    272     16
#>   5: 66c1d7bf-3f4d-4e2b-959b-174abbcbcc8a             3    81    273      4
#>  ---                                                                       
#> 343: e0500801-9bfc-487f-8cb3-5b4d536c7cb3           354    30    264      8
#> 344: e3695949-91f3-469c-9a88-5398b8687208           356    88    266      0
#> 345: d3777676-2f40-49d3-822f-ea188ba5f1ab           357    36    267     11
#> 346: 22d34b8d-9b19-4aa7-be0b-dbcec3244ac5           358    83    268     10
#> 347: e0c76bf2-823d-475d-afda-65aa8435407f           358    87    268     14
#>      trend associated planar_type quality unix_timestamp  notes
#>      <num>     <lgcl>      <char>  <char>          <num> <char>
#>   1:    83       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692891e+12   <NA>
#>   2:   312       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.693082e+12   <NA>
#>   3:    79       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692891e+12   <NA>
#>   4:    71       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692897e+12   <NA>
#>   5:    92       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.687873e+12   <NA>
#>  ---                                                           
#> 343:    69       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692897e+12   <NA>
#> 344:   266       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.687792e+12   <NA>
#> 345:    71       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692893e+12   <NA>
#> 346:    87       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692645e+12   <NA>
#> 347:   269       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692645e+12   <NA>
#>      modified_timestamp           spot        spot_id feature_type
#>                   <num>         <char>         <char>       <char>
#>   1:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-139 16928905110927    foliation
#>   2:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-170 16930814935740    foliation
#>   3:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-139 16928905110927    foliation
#>   4:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-141 16928973747488    foliation
#>   5:                 NA  23-TS-Moss-51 16878724705561    foliation
#>  ---                                                              
#> 343:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-141 16928973747488    foliation
#> 344:                 NA  23-TS-Moss-40 16877910624414    foliation
#> 345:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-140 16928926111747    foliation
#> 346:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-107 16926438777524    foliation
#> 347:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-107 16926438777524    foliation
#>       foliation_type  label contact_type fault_or_sz_type bedding_type
#>               <char> <char>       <char>           <char>       <char>
#>   1:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   2:     schistosity   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   3:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   4:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   5:     schistosity   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>  ---                                                                  
#> 343:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 344:        cleavage   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 345:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 346: slatey_cleavage   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 347: slatey_cleavage   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>      vein_fill directional_indicators vein_type other_vein_fill
#>         <char>                 <char>    <char>          <char>
#>   1:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   2:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   3:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   4:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   5:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>  ---                                                           
#> 343:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 344:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 345:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 346:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 347:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>      foliation_defined_by movement other_feature fracture_type
#>                    <char>   <char>        <char>        <char>
#>   1:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   2:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   3:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   4:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   5:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>  ---                                                          
#> 343:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 344:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 345:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 346:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 347:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>      movement_justification        linear_type linear_quality linear_notes
#>                      <char>             <char>         <char>       <char>
#>   1:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>   2:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>   3:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>   4:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>   5:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 343:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 344:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 345:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 346:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 347:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>      linear_feature_type linear_defined_by linear_label               type
#>                   <char>            <char>       <char>             <char>
#>   1:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   2:          stretching               Hbl         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   3:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   4:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   5:          stretching               Hbl         <NA> planar_orientation
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 343:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 344:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 345:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 346:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 347:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>      linear_unix_timestamp                            linear_id defined_by
#>                      <num>                               <char>     <char>
#>   1:          1.692891e+12 045ad2b9-5a85-4228-8273-55484b2ec6ce       <NA>
#>   2:          1.693082e+12 94bc8ef4-a758-4722-8ce5-236ba24ff444       <NA>
#>   3:          1.692891e+12 52e54e60-237e-4c9a-8873-9859cc445f97       <NA>
#>   4:          1.692897e+12 73357466-3526-4475-877a-4af76afcc696       <NA>
#>   5:          1.687873e+12 ff1ba044-0409-4db5-98bb-664a6604bac7       <NA>
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 343:          1.692897e+12 1df00205-dbda-4c79-b58a-c0db48e32abf       <NA>
#> 344:          1.687792e+12 4fec1a8e-a8f2-4a3f-9e8f-a1bd32179098       <NA>
#> 345:          1.692893e+12 b3203ffb-bab9-446a-9a8c-cff9dd003123       <NA>
#> 346:          1.692645e+12 52a946c8-6044-47d1-95c8-843f4e86b57d       <NA>
#> 347:          1.692645e+12 8c7944cc-10fe-4c11-ae01-4b31554e3d39       <NA>
#>      linear_other_feature
#>                    <char>
#>   1:                 <NA>
#>   2:                 <NA>
#>   3:                 <NA>
#>   4:                 <NA>
#>   5:                 <NA>
#>  ---                     
#> 343:                 <NA>
#> 344:                 <NA>

#> 
#> $linear
#> Line object (n = 347):
#>        azimuth plunge
#>   [1,]      83      6
#>   [2,]     312     50
#>   [3,]      79     11
#>   [4,]      71     16
#>   [5,]      92      4
#>   [6,]     278      3
#>   [7,]      65     57
#>   [8,]     347     31
#>   [9,]      81     22
#>  [10,]     291     13
#>  [11,]      79     17
#>  [12,]      86     20
#>  [13,]      93     17
#>  [14,]      61     25
#>  [15,]      31     20
#>  [16,]     293     10
#>  [17,]      65     28
#>  [18,]     111     25
#>  [19,]     139      2
#>  [20,]      49     40
#>  [21,]      94     37
#>  [22,]      73     56
#>  [23,]      17      1
#>  [24,]      19      3
#>  [25,]      19      3
#>  [26,]     183     35
#>  [27,]      22      3
